title: prunus × andarobi
intro: Prunus × andarobi, also known as Andarobi or Andarabi plum, is a hybrid plant species between Prunus avium (cherry) and Prunus cerasifera (plum). It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and combat bacterial infections due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Prunus × andarobi include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Prunus × andarobi often involve making teas, infusions, and extracts from its leaves, bark, and fruits, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
